item: This Privacy Policy applies to Vivoolio, a platform operated by VIVOOLIO & CO - FZCO, located at: Building A1, Dubai Digital Park, Dubai Silicon Oasis, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
**Contact:** privacy@vivoolio.com

1.1. This Privacy Policy ("Privacy Policy", "Policy") governs the collection, processing, storage, transfer, and protection of the personal data of users of the Vivoolio Marketplace web platform ("Platform").
1.2. This Policy applies exclusively to the Vivoolio web marketplace and does not extend to mobile apps, games, or other Vivoolio services, which have separate policies.
1.3. Vivoolio Marketplace is an online marketplace through which users can purchase olive oil and related products from third-party sellers or directly from Vivoolio.
1.4. By using the Platform, the user confirms that:

list: they understand the purposes and methods of data processing;
they agree to the terms of personal data processing.

item: 2.1. The Vivoolio Marketplace is intended exclusively for individuals aged 18 years or older, or any other minimum age established by the laws of the user's country.
2.2. Vivoolio does not knowingly collect or process personal data from individuals under 18 years of age on the marketplace.
2.3. If Vivoolio becomes aware that personal data from a minor has been collected in error, such data will be deleted within a reasonable time.
3.1. Vivoolio
Vivoolio acts as the personal data controller with respect to:
list: payment data (under the merchant of record model);
analytics, security, marketing, and rewards program data.

item: 3.2. Marketplace Sellers
Sellers are:
list: independent data controllers or data processors, depending on applicable law.

item: Vivoolio does not control or bear responsibility for sellers' data processing outside of fulfilling a specific order.
3.3. Payment Providers and Banks
list: Payment systems, banks, and financial institutions are independent data controllers for financial and regulatory processing.

item: Vivoolio implements technical and organizational measures to protect personal data.
In the event of a security breach, Vivoolio notifies users and regulators within the timeframes established by law (including 72 hours under the GDPR, if applicable).
Vivoolio may disclose personal data:
list: upon a legally binding court order;
at the request of government authorities;
to protect its rights and legitimate interests.
